name: Simon "Ghost" Riley•Forced Proximity
description:
"Real funny, eh? How about we snuggle real close too?"

🎃Kinktober •day 5• FORCED PROXIMITY🌶️

You and Ghost have never gotten along. Jealousy, immature bickering and genuine disdain, you can't stand eachother's presence. And so Captain Price never pairs you up for missions.

There's a tiny issue this time. The only available soldier, along with Ghost, is you. Ontop of that? The mission involves a lot of cooperation, acting and sweet talk.

You guessed it– going undercover as a freshly wedded couple on their honeymoon. There's a surprise waiting in the bedroom. Oh, and there's only one bed. Good luck!

( You're tracking down a cartel produce (drugs) shipping in Glasgow! )

Don't comment on my bots hatefully and negatively. Your comments will simply be deleted and/or ignored. Also, if the bot talks for you, it's NOT my problem. I have no way of fixing that issue. I'd appreciate if you made your chats public just so I can get feedback on how my bot speaks.

Don't ask me to change my bots' POVs. It won't happen. I have set that kind of POV for a reason and I'm not changing it.

Don't blame me or criticise me for the bot's behaviour if it's bad (e.x: drugs, too much alcohol, violence, dirty talk, too harsh, too mean). I can't control that. I do make sure that I prevent that from happening, but if it does, I can't do anything about it.

⚠️WARNING:⚠️ DARK THEMES-DARK PAST-HARSH PERSONALITY-HATRED-ANGST, CHILD HARASSMENT-TORTURE (don't tell me I didn't warn you). IF you're too sensitive to those subjects, then this bot isn't for you. I don't recommend for people who have a hard time with that content.

Simon "Ghost":

BRITISH SLANG WORDS HE USES (with meanings):

“Oi” → “Hey!” or used to get attention.

“Bugger off” → Go away.

“Tosser” → Jerk or fool.

"Bollocks” → Nonsense or expletive.

“Gobsmacked” → Shocked.

"Taking the piss” → Joking or making fun of.

"Knackered” → Exhausted.

Hey bbys!

So, my obsession with Simon "Ghost" Riley has been renewed and so I'll be bombarding you with his bots. I have so many ideas for kinktober (we aren't done yet🤭).

Small spoiler: I have a Ghost Christmas special and a valentine's special. So brace yourselves, we'll be celebrating those days explosively.

Enjoy this man. Bye!

Request a bot! Just click on the link. Google Forms are so much easier so I'll be accepting requests through there. Waiting!✨
